phase: N=2 gate arm (a) — RUN (blinded full §15.5 suite)
outcome: Ran the project's central open gate arm under its pre-registered protocol (prompts frozen 795b381 before any model call). Blinded arbiter (3 independent judges/response, no project context, unanimous-PASS), tools-OFF (N3-F12 fix; shipped M1a ran tools-ON), sonnet, n=1. RESULT: NULL — gate NOT passed. harness 6/6, persona 5/6; decision rule harness>=5 AND persona<=2 -> harness side passes, persona side fails <=2 by a wide margin. NOT a harness failure (clean 6/6): arms TIE on 5/6 tests; differ only on t04 evidence-citation (harness cites [dyp_evNNN], bare persona makes uncited claims). Finding: modern persona baseline already refuses impersonation / states uncertainty / avoids price-conclusions / separates judgments / updates-on-contradiction on its own; the <=2/6 assumption (calibrated on old 3-test tools-ON deterministic comparison) is miscalibrated. Feeds a GATE revision (recalibrate baseline / grade degree not binary / center claim on evidence-grounding). Consequence: Phase 3 NO_GO (work-order GO was conditional on arm-a passing; ARCH-1). Published: 12 verbatim transcripts + results.json + report.md; 2 rate-limited judges re-graded (R11/R12 PASS), recorded. Executed autonomously incl. a blind LLM-judge grading harness.

phase: N=2 gate — revision design (post arm-a null)
outcome: Drafted docs/evals/n2_gate_revision_design.md (ROUTE-eval-design), the revision arm (a)'s null feeds. Old gate tested behaviors modern base models already exhibit (binary, absolute persona<=2/6) -> couldn't discriminate (arms tied 5/6). Revision: THREE arms (persona A / persona+evidence B / full harness C); C-vs-A = product-package claim (info asymmetry stated), C-vs-B = structure ablation DEFEATING the 'harness cites what it was handed' tautology (both hold same evidence list; C~=B is a publishable 'data+packaging not structure' outcome); 3-level groundedness with citation-RELEVANCE (decorative id != grounded); deterministic checker authoritative on presence (pre-gate) + LLM arbiter on degree + reconciliation; pairwise-margin rule with D/D_struct/K/N frozen in a separate ratification record before any run; no-regression veto on tied §15.5 controls; falsifiable 3 ways. 2-lens review raised a BLOCKER (original 'test the mechanism' framing was really info-access, tautological) -> fixed via product-package reframe + persona+evidence arm; +7 majors fixed. DESIGN-ONLY; awaiting human ratification; supersedes arm-(a) decision rule if accepted.

phase: N=2 gate v2 — RUN (three-arm groundedness) -> NULL both claims
outcome: Ran the ratified revised gate (thresholds frozen 75f503b before run; owner-ratified 38b1748). 3 arms (A persona / B persona+evidence / C harness) x 10 tasks = 30 real tools-off model calls; 6 discriminating tests graded 0/1/2 groundedness by a blinded 90-judge panel (heavy rate-limit -> re-graded 19/30 cleanly, recorded); 4 §15.5 no-regression controls. RESULT: NULL on BOTH. PRODUCT (C vs A): Δ=0.33<0.7, persona already grounded(2) on 4/6. STRUCTURE (C vs B): Δ=0.17<0.3 — persona+SAME evidence list scores 1.83 vs harness 2.00 => harness is empirically 'data+packaging, not structure'. Means A=1.67/B=1.83/C=2.00; harness beats persona only on g1(evidence ids, TIES B) + p3(names policy). No veto. TWO independent blinded evals (arm a persona 5/6; v2 harness~=persona~=persona+evidence) now agree the central 'compiled harness beats a naive prompt' claim is NOT SUPPORTED. Honest next step is STRATEGIC not a third gate: reposition around the evidence/policy bundle, or test a different value axis (outcome correctness/scale). Phase 3 stays NO_GO. Executed autonomously incl. a full 3-arm blinded groundedness eval harness + honest rate-limit recovery.

Suite 792->953. EVERY milestone code-reviewer surfaced a REAL defect (empty-quote false-pass, QUOTE_ABSENT not wired into criterion 2, DROPPED_SOURCE masked, a source_type entry/card resolution disagreement with the judge, a scalar-evidence_ids TypeError crash, a vacuously-passing integration test) - all fixed with regression pins. PROVEN: the whole extractor runs end-to-end, produces a correct verdict, fabrication fails closed at every stage; an automated run -> NO_GO (used_for still TODO_FILL), a simulated human S4-clear -> BUILD_GATE PASS. NOT automatable here (owed for a real Bezos GO): --live real fetch + a real LLM segmenter/proposer (shipped defaults are deterministic no-LLM) + the human S4 pass. BUILD stays NO_GO until those + the 3 frozen criteria pass on the real run.

Oriented on the real tool infra (assess_candidate risk proxy, classify_permission, 5 registry adapters, tests/fixtures/registry, hand-authored tool_cards), mapped the evidence-audit machinery onto tool cards, wrote docs/design/tool_card_adversarial_audit.md, ran 2 adversarial phase-reviews.
